# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cicd security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Workflow

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_command:
        description: 'Build command to execute'
        required: true
        default: 'make build'
        type: choice
        options:
          - 'make build'
          - 'make build-release'
          - 'npm run build'
          - 'npm run build:prod'
          - 'gradle build'
          - 'gradle build --release'
          - 'mvn package'
          - 'mvn package -DskipTests'
      test_command:
        description: 'Test command to execute'
        required: true
        default: 'make test'
        type: choice
        options:
          - 'make test'
          - 'make test-unit'
          - 'make test-integration'
          - 'npm test'
          - 'npm run test:ci'
          - 'gradle test'
          - 'mvn test'
          - 'mvn verify'
      lint_command:
        description: 'Lint command to execute'
        required: true
        default: 'make lint'
        type: choice
        options:
          - 'make lint'
          - 'npm run lint'
          - 'npm run lint:fix'
          - 'gradle checkstyle'
          - 'mvn checkstyle:check'
      environment:
        description: 'Target environment'
        required: true
        default: 'staging'
        type: choice
        options:
          - 'development'
          - 'staging'
          - 'production'
      node_version:
        description: 'Node.js version (if applicable)'
        required: false
        default: '18'
        type: choice
        options:
          - '16'
          - '18'
          - '20'
      java_version:
        description: 'Java version (if applicable)'
        required: false
        default: '17'
        type: choice
        options:
          - '11'
          - '17'
          - '21'

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  validate-inputs:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      build_command: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.build_command }}
      test_command: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.test_command }}
      lint_command: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.lint_command }}
      environment: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.environment }}
    steps:
      - name: Validate inputs
        id: validate
        run: |
          # Since we use type: choice, inputs are already constrained to allowed values.
          # This step serves as an additional defense-in-depth validation layer.

          ALLOWED_BUILD_COMMANDS=(
            "make build"
            "make build-release"
            "npm run build"
            "npm run build:prod"
            "gradle build"
            "gradle build --release"
            "mvn package"
            "mvn package -DskipTests"
          )

          ALLOWED_TEST_COMMANDS=(
            "make test"
            "make test-unit"
            "make test-integration"
            "npm test"
            "npm run test:ci"
            "gradle test"
            "mvn test"
            "mvn verify"
          )

          ALLOWED_LINT_COMMANDS=(
            "make lint"
            "npm run lint"
            "npm run lint:fix"
            "gradle checkstyle"
            "mvn checkstyle:check"
          )

          ALLOWED_ENVIRONMENTS=(
            "development"
            "staging"
            "production"
          )

          validate_input() {
            local input_value="$1"
            local input_name="$2"
            shift 2
            local allowed_values=("$@")

            local found=false
            for allowed in "${allowed_values[@]}"; do
              if [ "$input_value" = "$allowed" ]; then
                found=true
                break
              fi
            done

            if [ "$found" = false ]; then
              echo "::error::Invalid ${input_name}: '${input_value}' is not in the allowed list."
              exit 1
            fi
          }

          BUILD_CMD="${{ inputs.build_command }}"
          TEST_CMD="${{ inputs.test_command }}"
          LINT_CMD="${{ inputs.lint_command }}"
          ENV="${{ inputs.environment }}"

          validate_input "$BUILD_CMD" "build_command" "${ALLOWED_BUILD_COMMANDS[@]}"
          validate_input "$TEST_CMD" "test_command" "${ALLOWED_TEST_COMMANDS[@]}"
          validate_input "$LINT_CMD" "lint_command" "${ALLOWED_LINT_COMMANDS[@]}"
          validate_input "$ENV" "environment" "${ALLOWED_ENVIRONMENTS[@]}"

          echo "build_command=$BUILD_CMD" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "test_command=$TEST_CMD" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "lint_command=$LINT_CMD" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "environment=$ENV" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

          echo "✅ All inputs validated successfully"

  build:
    needs: validate-inputs
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.environment }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        if: contains(needs.validate-inputs.outputs.build_command, 'npm')
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ inputs.node_version }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Setup Java
        if: contains(needs.validate-inputs.outputs.build_command, 'gradle') || contains(needs.validate-inputs.outputs.build_command, 'mvn')
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: ${{ inputs.java_version }}

      - name: Install dependencies (npm)
        if: contains(needs.validate-inputs.outputs.build_command, 'npm')
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run lint
        run: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.lint_command }}

      - name: Run build
        run: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.build_command }}
        env:
          BUILD_ENVIRONMENT: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.environment }}
          CI: 'true'

      - name: Run tests
        run: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.test_command }}
        env:
          BUILD_ENVIRONMENT: ${{ needs.validate-inputs.outputs.environment }}
          CI: 'true'

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: |
            dist/
            build/
            target/
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: warn
